title: World, Other, Self, and Consciousness as Boundary Phenomena
one_sentence: This module defines world, other, self, consciousness, and meaning as positions within a single boundary re-entry dynamics.
core_sequence: Consciousness as boundary-change monitoring with write-back
Meaning as stabilized boundary re-entry residue

minimal_tests.otherness: Does mismatch remain persistent after available model updates?
minimal_tests.consciousness: Does boundary-displacement monitoring write back into next transition selection?
minimal_tests.meaning: Does a boundary pattern persist across transitions?

negative_constraints: Do not treat consciousness as substance.
Do not treat self as pre-given subject.
Do not treat world and other as different ontological kinds.
Do not treat this module as a proof of consciousness or personhood.
